queries.question: What are the passing marks on exams assessed by Professor Smith and on quizzes assessed by the same professor?
queries.sql:
SELECT Assessments.PassingMark 
FROM Assessments 
WHERE (Assessments.AssessmentMethod = 'Exam' OR Assessments.AssessmentMethod = 'Quiz') AND Assessments.Assessor = 'Professor Smith'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?passingmark WHERE {
  ?assessments a :Assessments .
  ?assessments p:PassingMark ?passingmark .
  ?assessments p:AssessmentMethod ?assessmentmethod_w .
  ?assessments p:AssessmentMethod ?assessmentmethod_w2 .
  ?assessments p:Assessor ?assessor_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?assessmentmethod_w) = "Exam" || STR(?assessmentmethod_w2) = "Quiz")) && STR(?assessor_w) = "Professor Smith"))
}

queries.question: What are the passing marks of exams and quiz assessed by Professor Smith?
queries.sql:
SELECT Assessments.PassingMark 
FROM Assessments 
WHERE Assessments.AssessmentMethod = 'Exam' OR Assessments.AssessmentMethod = 'Quiz' AND Assessments.Assessor = 'Professor Smith'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?passingmark WHERE {
  ?assessments a :Assessments .
  ?assessments p:PassingMark ?passingmark .
  ?assessments p:AssessmentMethod ?assessmentmethod_w .
  ?assessments p:AssessmentMethod ?assessmentmethod_w2 .
  ?assessments p:Assessor ?assessor_w .
  FILTER((STR(?assessmentmethod_w) = "Exam" || (STR(?assessmentmethod_w2) = "Quiz" && STR(?assessor_w) = "Professor Smith")))
}
